bubble.shortDescription: 10% chance to lower the foe(s) Speed by 1.
bubble.description: Has a 10% chance to lower the target's Speed by 1 stage.

bubblebeam.shortDescription: 10% chance to lower the target's Speed by 1.
bubblebeam.description: Has a 10% chance to lower the target's Speed by 1 stage.

bugbite.shortDescription: User steals and eats the target's Berry.
bugbite.description: If this move is successful and the user has not fainted, it steals the target's held Berry if it is holding one and eats it immediately, gaining its effects even if the user's item is being ignored. Items lost to this move cannot be regained with Recycle or the Harvest Ability.

bugbuzz.shortDescription: 10% chance to lower the target's Sp. Def by 1.
bugbuzz.description: Has a 10% chance to lower the target's Special Defense by 1 stage.

bulkup.shortDescription: Raises the user's Attack and Defense by 1.
bulkup.description: Raises the user's Attack and Defense by 1 stage.

bulldoze.shortDescription: 100% chance lower adjacent Pkmn Speed by 1.
bulldoze.description: Has a 100% chance to lower the target's Speed by 1 stage.

bulletseed.description: Hits two to five times. Has a 35% chance to hit two or three times and a 15% chance to hit four or five times. If one of the hits breaks the target's substitute, it will take damage for the remaining hits. If the user has the Skill Link Ability, this move will always hit five times.

burningbulwark.shortDescription: Protects from damaging attacks. Contact: burn.
burningbulwark.description: The user is protected from most attacks made by other Pokemon during this turn, and Pokemon trying to make contact with the user become burned. Non-damaging moves go through this protection. This move has a 1/X chance of being successful, where X starts at 1 and triples each time this move is successfully used. X resets to 1 if this move fails, if the user's last move used is not Baneful Bunker, Burning Bulwark, Detect, Endure, King's Shield, Max Guard, Obstruct, Protect, Quick Guard, Silk Trap, Spiky Shield, or Wide Guard, or if it was one of those moves and the user's protection was broken. Fails if the user moves last this turn.

burningjealousy.shortDescription: 100% burns a target that had a stat rise this turn.
burningjealousy.description: Has a 100% chance to burn the target if it had a stat stage raised this turn.

burnup.shortDescription: User's Fire type becomes typeless; must be Fire.
burnup.description: Fails unless the user is a Fire type. If this move is successful and the user is not Terastallized, the user's Fire type becomes typeless as long as it remains active.
